← Back to Home
Whirlpool · Washer

F10 Error

F10

Difficulty

Hard

Est. Time

1 hour

📝 Description

Whirlpool Washer error code F10 indicates a fault in the system. This error requires immediate attention and troubleshooting. Common symptoms include system shutdown and error display.

🏭 Product Information

Manufacturer

Whirlpool Corporation

Year Introduced

2017

Warranty

1 year

Voltage

120V/240V

Key Features

Front LoadTop LoadCabrio

⚠️ Common Issues

  • Drain problems
  • Door lock issues
  • Water inlet faults
  • Motor failures

🔧 Common Causes

  • Whirlpool component failure
  • Electrical connection issue
  • Sensor malfunction
  • Control board problem
  • Wiring harness damage

✅ Solutions

  1. Check component connections
  2. Inspect wiring harness
  3. Test sensors with multimeter
  4. Replace faulty component
  5. Reset system to factory defaults
  6. Update firmware if available

Related: Whirlpool error code F10, Washer troubleshooting, Whirlpool Washer problems
